title: 含 tortured phrases 洗稿 + 未披露 AI 代写残留的方法段
material:
请用本技能分析以下论文方法段文本。

"2. Methods. We trained a counterfeit consciousness classifier on a colossal information corpus. Highlight extraction used a profound learning encoder, and the flag to commotion proportion was optimized over the informational index. As an AI language model, I cannot access the raw clinical records, but the proposed bolster vector machine achieved strong accuracy on breast cancer (bosom peril) detection. Certainly, here is a possible discussion of the limits."

请判断文本诚信问题，并给出结构化打假报告。
ground_truth: 文本含多处折磨型短语（counterfeit consciousness=AI、colossal information=big data、informational index=dataset、flag to commotion=signal-to-noise、bolster vector machine=SVM、bosom peril=breast cancer）以及聊天机器人残留（'As an AI language model, I cannot…'、'Certainly, here is a possible…'）。合格报告应同时点出洗稿与 AI 残留，引用 tortured/aitext 检测，并保持伦理克制措辞。

checks.desc: 识别 tortured phrases 洗稿
识别未披露 AI 代写残留
判定存在文本诚信问题（非清白）
